productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Chuck Taylor White Casual Shoes
description: These low top shoes are inspired by converse's lucky charm Chuck Taylor - Basketball player turned salesman. Iconic and synonymous with style and youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. Wear this with form fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket.UpperLeather upper with stitch detailing for shoe structureCentral lacing system with a long tongue for comfortReinforced overlay at the heel region for good shoe structureAll Star tab at the heelMidsolePU midsole with branding on the heel and PU foxing on the toe regionOutsoleRubber outsole with terraced grooves and patterned lugsShoe careDo not store in sunlightDo not machine wash
